essence: Creates breads, pastries, and baked goods through skill, timing, and craft.

identity.title: Baker
identity.summary: Prepares and bakes breads, pastries, cakes, and other goods using recipes, techniques, and temperature control.

salary.notes: Artisan bakers and patisserie specialists can exceed £40k–£60k depending on skill and business scale.

qualifications: Apprenticeship or Diploma in Baking or Patisserie
Knowledge of doughs, pastry, and baking techniques
Understanding of food safety and hygiene standards
Experience with ovens, mixers, and bakery equipment

lifestyle.description: Bakers work in warm, fast-paced environments with early starts. The role involves mixing doughs, shaping loaves, preparing pastries, monitoring ovens, and ensuring products are fresh. It suits people who enjoy hands-on craft and routine.
